session.user: Run pytest on the checkout_cmd test file to see how it's invoked and confirm its tests pass: ``` pytest packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py -v ``` Report all output including any failures, exactly how to run the command.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command on the checkout_cmd test file for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on checkout_cmd test file with verbose output

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 ============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 0 items / 1 error
==================================== ERRORS ==================================== _____ ERROR collecting packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py ______ ImportError while importing test module '/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py'. Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names. Traceback: ../../_temp/uv-python-dir/cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.13/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py:9: in <module> from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tests.fakes' =========================== short test summary info ============================ ERROR packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Interrupted: 1 error during collection !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! =============================== 1 error in 1.07s ===============================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: Import error - ModuleNotFoundError
The test file cannot be imported because it has an import issue:
**Error Location:** `packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py:9`
**Problem:** `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tests.fakes'`
The test file tries to import: ```python from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit ```
But the module path is incorrect. The test is in a nested package structure (`packages/erk-slots/`) and is using an absolute import `tests.fakes` that doesn't resolve properly from that location.
**How to run the command:** ```bash uv run pytest packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py -v ```
**To fix this issue**, the import in the test file needs to be corrected to use a proper relative import or the correct absolute path that resolves from the workspace root.
